prompt: Create a moody vertical fantasy anime illustration of Kanon, a young traveling alchemist sitting on the broken edge of an old stone pier above a misty flooded ruin at sunset. The character wears a dark baseball cap, large blue headphones, a pale hooded travel cloak over layered adventurer clothing, dark loose trousers, fingerless gloves, and heavy lace-up boots; long blonde hair falls in two thick braids over the shoulders. A square muted gray face-obscuring block covers the face, centered under the cap brim. She holds a small glass vial of glowing blue liquid in both hands, with two additional potion bottles hanging from a worn brown leather satchel at her hip. Beside her on the stone ledge sits one small spherical robot companion, white and weathered, with a black screen face showing two cyan glowing eyes and a cyan ring light on its side. The background shows a broad reflective swamp or lake, reeds in the foreground, drifting fog, and distant ruined gothic towers and arches silhouetted against a warm low sun near the horizon. Use atmospheric perspective, soft painterly brushwork, cool blue-gray shadows contrasted with warm peach sunset light, subtle magical glow from the potion and robot, detailed fabric folds, damp stone texture, cinematic composition, melancholic yet adventurous mood, high-quality fantasy concept art, portrait aspect ratio.
